info.name: LithoApp Backend Validation
info.description:
Import this collection together with LithoApp_Local_Environment.json.

Recommended execution order:
1. Patient Service
2. Episode Service
3. Analysis Service
4. Drainage Service
5. Full Workflow Tests
6. Negative / Validation Tests

Notes:
- Service URLs come from the Spring Boot configs in the repository:
  patient-service 8086, episode-service 8085, analysis-service 8082, drainage-service 8084.
- Metabolic upload requests require selecting a real PDF file in Postman before sending.
- The collection stores runtime IDs automatically into environment variables.

body.raw:
{
  "di": "DI-{{$timestamp}}",
  "dmi": "DMI-{{$timestamp}}",
  "firstName": "Amina",
  "lastName": "WorkflowPatient",
  "birthDate": "1988-05-14",
  "gender": "FEMALE",
  "height": 168.0,
  "weight": 67.5,
  "address": "12 Clinical Avenue",
  "email": "workflow.patient+{{$timestamp}}@example.com",
  "phone": "+2348000000001",
  "clinicalInfo": {
    "familyHistory": true,
    "personalHistory": false,
    "lastEpisodeDate": "2025-10-12",
    "lithiasisType": "Calcium Oxalate",
    "frequentInfections": false,
    "singleKidney": false,
    "kidneyType": "ANATOMICAL",
    "chronicRenalFailure": false,
    "clearance": 92.4
  },
  "medication": {
    "hasMedication": true,
    "description": "Potassium citrate"
  },
  "associatedDiseases": [
    "Hypertension"
  ],
  "geneticDiseases": [
    "None"
  ],
  "anatomicalAnomalies": [
    "None"
  ]
}

{
  "patientId": {{patientId}},
  "openedAt": "2026-02-11",
  "title": "Initial stone episode",
  "notes": "Right flank pain with microscopic hematuria.",
  "recurrence": false
}

request.description: Select a real PDF file in Postman before sending this request.

item.name: Start Analysis Via Stone Result Update

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": {{workflowPatientId}},
  "openedAt": "2026-04-01",
  "title": "Workflow case episode",
  "notes": "Acute renal colic workflow validation case.",
  "recurrence": true
}

item.name: 4. Start Analysis (auto-transition via first result update)
Create Secondary Patient For Mismatch Tests

body.raw:
{
  "patientId": {{nonexistent_patient_id}},
  "openedAt": "2026-04-10",
  "title": "Invalid patient episode",
  "notes": "Should fail because patient does not exist.",
  "recurrence": false
}

item.name: Create Analysis With Mismatched Patient And Episode
Create Fresh Analysis For Completion Guard

body.raw:
{
  "episodeId": {{episodeId}},
  "patientId": {{nonexistent_patient_id}},
  "doctorId": {{doctorId}},
  "drainageType": "JJ",
  "side": "LEFT",
  "placedAt": "2026-04-11",
  "jjType": "STANDARD_6F",
  "notes": "Should fail because patient does not exist."
}

{
  "episodeId": {{nonexistent_episode_id}},
  "patientId": {{patientId}},
  "doctorId": {{doctorId}},
  "drainageType": "JJ",
  "side": "LEFT",
  "placedAt": "2026-04-11",
  "jjType": "STANDARD_6F",
  "notes": "Should fail because episode does not exist."
}

item.name: Create Drainage With Mismatched Patient And Episode

body.raw:
{
  "episodeId": {{episodeId}},
  "patientId": {{mismatchPatientId}},
  "doctorId": {{doctorId}},
  "drainageType": "JJ",
  "side": "RIGHT",
  "placedAt": "2026-04-11",
  "jjType": "STANDARD_6F",
  "notes": "Should fail because patient and episode do not match."
}

{
  "episodeId": {{episodeId}},
  "patientId": {{patientId}},
  "doctorId": {{doctorId}},
  "drainageType": "JJ",
  "side": "BILATERAL",
  "placedAt": "2026-04-11",
  "notes": "Should fail because jjType is required for JJ."
}
